title: lathyrus occidentalis subvar. velutinus
intro: Lathyrus occidentalis subvar. velutinus, also known as the Western sweetpea or velvety pea, is a perennial legume native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus occidentalis subvar. velutinus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
